subject: Add /etc/hosts
commit_message:
Add /etc/hosts

Issue-ID: PORTAL-782
Change-Id: I8f7abd28c357cf6525c3368f38035a45126bf2ae
Signed-off-by: Brian Freeman <bf1936@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

added a change to integration to set kubernetesExternalIp from the heat template variables

Patch Set 1:

manually applied the patch to robot to new container with these charts
root@release-nfs:~/oom/kubernetes/robot# ./ete-k8s.sh onap healthportalapp2 
++ export NAMESPACE=onap
++ NAMESPACE=onap
+++ kubectl --namespace onap get pods
+++ sed 's/ .*//'
+++ grep robot
++ POD=dev-robot-robot-78598dc4d9-xb2kb
++ TAGS='-i healthportalapp2'
+++ dirname ./ete-k8s.sh
++ DIR=.
++ SCRIPTDIR=scripts/etescript
++ ETEHOME=/var/opt/ONAP
++ [[ healthportalapp2 == \e\x\e\c\s\c\r\i\p\t ]]
+++ kubectl --namespace onap exec dev-robot-robot-78598dc4d9-xb2kb -- bash -c 'ls -1q /share/logs/ | wc -l'
++ export GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER=37
++ GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER=37
+++ printf %04d 37
++ OUTPUT_FOLDER=0037_ete_healthportalapp2
++ DISPLAY_NUM=127
++ VARIABLEFILES='-V /share/config/robot_properties.py'
++ VARIABLES='-v GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER:21920'
++ kubectl --namespace onap exec dev-robot-robot-78598dc4d9-xb2kb -- /var/opt/ONAP/runTags.sh -V /share/config/robot_properties.py -v GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER:21920 -d /share/logs/0037_ete_healthportalapp2 -i healthportalapp2 --display 127
